case.title: SAFEWAY TRAILS, INC., v. UNITED STATES

opinion.h1: SAFEWAY TRAILS, INC., v. UNITED STATES, 361 U.S. 86 (1959)
opinion.h4: SAFEWAY TRAILS, INC., v. UNITED STATES ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE DISTRICT OF COLUMBIA. No. 375. Decided November 9, 1959.
opinion.p: William A. Roberts and Maxwell A. Howell for appellant.

Solicitor General Rankin, Acting Assistant Attorney General Bicks, Richard A. Solomon, John C. Danielson, Robert W. Ginnane and Arthur J. Cerra for the United States and the Interstate Commerce Commission, and Frank B. Hand, Jr. for Baltimore and Annapolis Railroad Co., appellees.
The motions to affirm are granted and the judgment is affirmed.
361 U.S. 86 GLOVER v. MICHIGAN. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF MICHIGAN. No. 265, Misc. Decided November 9, 1959.
The appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
